title: World Cup quiz: Name every player in England's squad
summary: England have 12 days until their World Cup opener against Croatia under manager Thomas Tuchel. This article presents a player-naming quiz testing knowledge of the squad selection.
content: There are just 12 days until England play their World Cup opener against Croatia - but can you name ever member of the squad picked by Thomas Tuchel?

title: Old Firm miss out on Andersen as Patterson linked with Blades - gossip
summary: A midfielder linked with Old Firm appears headed to Portugal in the transfer market, while Scotland defender Patterson is being pursued by Sheffield United.
content: Old Firm-linked midfielder seemingly heading to Portugal as Scotland defender is linked with Sheffield United.

title: How Hendry's Saudi Arabia experience can help him stay cool in US heat
summary: Scotland player Jack Hendry's previous experience in Saudi Arabia's climate prepares him for Miami's humidity and heat during the World Cup.
content: The humidity and heat in Miami is not what most of the Scotland squad are used to. But it's normal for Jack Hendry.

title: Superstar in Spain, doubted in Brazil: Will Vinicius convince a nation?
summary: Despite being considered one of the world's best players, Brazilian star Vinicius Junior faces pressure to win over the domestic public at the World Cup.
content: Vinicius Junior is considered one of the best players in the world, but can he make the Brazilian public fall in love with him at the World Cup?

zh.title: 在西班牙是超级巨星，在巴西遭质疑：小维尼修斯能说服国民吗？

title: Yamal-less Spain held by Iraq in WC sendoff
summary: Spain drew 1-1 with Iraq in their World Cup warm-up match, leaving the squad frustrated in their final preparation game without key player Yamal.
content: Spain were left frustrated in their first World Cup warm-up match as they laboured to a 1-1 draw with Iraq at the Estadio de Riazor in La Coruña.

title: Amad nets late winner as Ivory Coast stun France
summary: Manchester United's Amad scored a late winner to deliver a surprise 2-1 victory for Ivory Coast over a rotated France squad in World Cup warm-up play.
content: Manchester United forward Amad scored a late winner to give Ivory Coast a shock 2-1 victory over a much-changed France in their World Cup warmup match in Nantes.

zh.title: 阿马德攻入晚期进球，象牙海岸爆冷击败法国

title: Japan ditches pre-WC training site over poor pitch...
summary: Japan changed its World Cup training venue in Monterrey after players encountered an uneven pitch with patches of dirt at their original facility.
content: Japan has changed practice venues in Monterrey ahead of the World Cup after players encountered an uneven pitch marred by patches of dirt at their original training ground.

zh.title: 日本因球场状况不佳放弃世界杯前训练基地

title: Mexico rout Serbia in festive final WCup warmup
summary: Mexico defeated Serbia 5-1 in front of a home crowd in their final World Cup warm-up match, one week before their tournament opener against South Africa.
content: In front of a roaring home crowd, Mexico wrapped up their World Cup warmups on Thursday with a dominant 5-1 victory over Serbia, exactly one week before their tournament opener against South Africa.

title: Madrid's Pérez vows $174M Galactico bid if elected...
summary: Real Madrid president candidate Florentino Pérez pledged to pursue a €150 million marquee 'Galáctico' signing this summer if elected in Sunday's presidential election.
content: Florentino Pérez promised to bid for a $174 million (€150 million) "Galáctico" player this summer as he tries to win Sunday's presidential elections at Real Madrid.

title: Sources: Silva set to replace Mourinho at Benfica
summary: Benfica have agreed to appoint Marco Silva as head coach to replace José Mourinho, according to ESPN sources.
content: Benfica have reached an agreement with Marco Silva to replace José Mourinho as head coach, sources told ESPN's Bruno Andrade.

title: Swiss striker Embolo gets U.S. visa after hang-up
summary: Switzerland striker Breel Embolo received his U.S. visa Thursday after a two-day delay and is now cleared to travel to the FIFA World Cup.
content: Switzerland striker Breel Embolo received a visa Thursday and is headed to the FIFA World Cup, following a two-day delay in the authorization of his travel to the United States.
